text: Which sentence is a proposition?

a: at least one of \(p\) or \(q\) is true

text: The truth table for \(p \lor q\) shows it is false only when _____.
The _exclusive or_ \(p \oplus q\) is true when _____.
answer: exactly one of \(p\) or \(q\) is true
c: exactly one of \(p\) or \(q\) is true
